name: Roasted Red and Green Pepper Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the peppers in half, vertically, and remove the seeds.
2. Char under the broiler on both sides (about 5 minutes per side).
3. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Peel and dice the peppers and set aside.
5. Blend mayonnaise and sour cream until smooth.
6. Mix in lemon juice and parsley.
7. Fold in the peppers.
8. Cover and chill.
9. Garnish with additional chopped fresh parsley and sprinkle with paprika, if desired.
Makes about 3 cups of dip. Deli meats, elephant garlic chips, baby corn, string beans, carrots, and bread sticks are suggested dippers.
